data.title: Dutch lawmakers approve 36% tax rule; exemptions for assets like start-up equity and non-investment property.
data.description: Some assets, such as shares in an eligible start-up and tangible property intended for personal use, were not subject to the 36% tax.

data.title: Fidelity Director predicts Bitcoin to hit $60,000 low with new bull market starting at $67,589 after a few months of consolidation.
data.description: Fidelity's global macro director, Jurrien Timmer, identified Bitcoin's recent $60,000 price as the low for the current cycle, suggesting that a new bull market is likely to commence after a period of consolidation, with Bitcoin trading around $67,589. Timmer had previously forecasted this support level when he indicated the end of the four-year cycle bull market. While Timmer acknowledges uncertainty about whether $60,000 is definitively the bottom, he anticipates that the crypto asset will begin a new phase following some consolidation. Timmer's optimism is rooted in pattern recognition. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: CertainTeed Roofing expansion at Peachtree City, Georgia doubles production capacity, manufacturing more roofing shingles for US customers.
data.description: A ceremony was held in Peachtree City, Georgia, to celebrate the completion of expansion activities at the CertainTeed Roofing manufacturing facility. The project, initially announced in 2022, has successfully doubled the site's production capacity. This expansion allows the company, a subsidiary of Saint-Gobain, to produce more roofing shingles to meet the rising demand in the southeastern region of the United States. The ribbon-cutting event signifies a significant milestone for the company's growth and commitment to serving its customers in the fast-expanding market.

data.title: Four couples in Brooklyn renew their vows at Junior's on Feb. 13, 2026, as part of the restaurant's 75th anniversary celebration.
data.description: Four couples reaffirmed their love vows at Junior's on Friday, February 13 to celebrate Valentine's Day. The vow renewals were officiated by third-generation owner Alan Rosen and were part of the restaurant's 75th-anniversary celebrations. The event, known as "Junior's Love Stories," attracted couples in Brooklyn, New York.

data.title: Furniture Expert Randy Marohn from Hamburg, NY, explains how to distinguish solid wood furniture from veneer in a HelloNation article.
data.description: In Hamburg, NY on February 13, 2026, shoppers seeking to distinguish between solid wood furniture and veneered options can find guidance in an article from HelloNation. The piece showcases insights from Randy Marohn, a furniture expert from Sans Furniture Inc., based in Hamburg. Marohn's expertise helps those uncertain about spotting genuine wood pieces versus veneer alternatives.

data.title: ADP Jobs Report beats forecasts, complicates Fed's rate cut decision; S&P 500 remains stable.
data.description: It is uncertain if there will be a rate cut in December. The recent ADP Jobs Report exceeded expectations, creating uncertainty regarding the Federal Reserve's outlook. The S&P 500 remained stable amidst this news.

data.title: PA Realtors® praise Gov. Shapiro for Housing Action Plan addressing key issues, released in Feb 2026.
data.description: In Lemoyne, Pennsylvania on February 13, 2026, the Pennsylvania Association of Realtors® praised Gov. Josh Shapiro for his dedication to housing concerns as outlined in his latest Housing Action Plan. The plan is a comprehensive strategy aimed at tackling the multifaceted challenges in the housing sector. This initiative has garnered recognition for its thorough approach to addressing crucial issues impacting the state's housing market.

data.title: Correction: ABS Global Investments launches Pre-IPO & Growth Fund (IPOSX) on 11-Feb-2026, without Blue Owl Capital logo.
data.description: ABS Global Investments has recently introduced the Pre-IPO & Growth Fund (IPOSX) on 11-Feb-2026. In a news release, it was mentioned that the Blue Owl Capital logo was mistakenly included. The corrected release clarifies that ABS Global Investments launched the fund, emphasizing the error regarding the logo inclusion.

data.title: ARKO Corp. (Nasdaq: ARKO) will report Q4 and full year 2025 financial results on Feb 25, 2026; a Fortune 500 company.
data.description: A leading Fortune 500 company, ARKO Corp. (Nasdaq: ARKO), known for its extensive network of convenience stores and fuel wholesale operations in the US, is set to conduct a conference call on February 25, 2026, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to review financial outcomes for Q4 and the full year concluding on December 31, 2025. This significant event allows stakeholders to gain insights into the company's performance during the specified periods.
